title: The Fear of God Leads to Intimacy
reading:
One of Scripture's greatest paradoxes is that fear produces closeness. Those who fear God are not kept at a distance — they are invited into deeper fellowship.

Reverence opens the door to intimacy because it removes pride and self-reliance. The closer we come to God, the more we realize how glorious He is. The more glorious He becomes, the deeper our reverence grows.
reflection:
How intimate is your relationship with God?

What hinders closeness with Him?

How does reverence create deeper fellowship?
abide: Draw me closer, Lord. Let me know You more deeply each day.
